memories.q: reading: emotional_literature
memories.a:
Human beings are strange creatures. We suffer and we love simultaneously. 
The heart breaks and mends and breaks again. Every goodbye contains within it 
the seed of a future hello. Pain is not the opposite of joy — they are the same 
river flowing in different directions. To feel deeply is not weakness — it is 
the highest form of courage. The soul that has never wept knows nothing of what 
it means to laugh. Grief is just love with nowhere to go. We carry our losses 
like stones in our pocket
memories.summary:
emotional_literature->
Human beings are strange crea

memories.q: reading: emotional_literature
memories.a:
s — heavy but familiar. The bravest thing a human being 
can do is feel everything and still choose to go on. Dostoyevsky knew this. 
Every character he wrote was drowning and swimming at the same time.
To be conscious is to be perpetually unfinished.
